evidence: `dotnet build agentpowershell.sln --no-restore --verbosity minimal` succeeded after the Batch 2 changes.
Manual smoke test for `session list` in text mode returned the supported human-readable output (`No sessions.` on a clean store).
Manual smoke test for blocked network execution returned `exitCode: 126`, `policyDecision: deny`, and `No matching network rule.`.
Manual smoke test for `start`, `status`, and `stop` showed the daemon process being launched, reported as running with PID/process name/working directory, and then stopped cleanly.
testGaps: There is still no end-to-end integration test that launches the real shim binary, auto-starts the daemon, and round-trips through IPC in one test.
The new daemon launch discovery path is covered by focused unit tests, but not yet by a published-binary packaging test.
unresolvedIssues: Interactive shell replacement and fully installable PATH shim behavior remain incomplete by design and are still broader parity gaps outside this batch.
